violations.description: Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. Hot dog roller not provided with adequate sneeze protection.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Reach in cooler for pizza station ha multiple torn/damaged gaskets.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Minor detail cleaning needed.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Pooling water around water softener tanks.
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
